summary: Phase 6 (ffmpeg render queue) frontend E2E verified on the seeded COMPLETED 'AI trading' project (760aa5f9-2fc0-4142-a348-0ec7ad4362c9). Login as creator -> /app/projects/ -> tab-render. render-checklist shows all 6 prerequisite tiles (pre-script, pre-scenes, pre-metadata, pre-thumbnail, pre-voiceover, pre-scene_assets) all green. render-preview-thumbnail () and render-preview-voiceover (

issues: Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings — unchanged from prior iterations

critical_code_review_comments: RenderPanel polling cadence is 2500ms (matches spec '2.5s'). TERMINAL states wired correctly — on completion, preflight+jobs+full project are re-fetched and onChange(full) bubbles to parent so Overview tile reflects final_video immediately. Good.
render-download-btn is a native <a href=output_url download=<name>.mp4> — no JS handler, clean. 'download' attribute is respected same-origin.
Public share final_video shape is correctly whitelisted to {url, duration, width, height}. file_path is NOT leaked. Verified on live token.
When a previous cancelled job exists, RenderPanel shows it as the latest activeJob on mount. Start button remains enabled because cancelled is not in ACTIVE_STATES (correct).
Tooltip on disabled render-start-btn uses native HTML title attribute — readable but not screenshotable in Playwright; consider a ShadCN Tooltip for better a11y/testability in a future iteration.
No retry/backoff logic on the polling fetch — silent retries only. A 2-minute backend outage would keep the UI stuck in the last known state forever; low priority.

success_rate.backend: not re-tested (108/108 reported by main agent)
success_rate.frontend: 11/12 Phase-6 items fully verified; 1 item (negative test on a blank project) partially verified via code review only — see note

seed_data_creation: No new seed. Used existing COMPLETED project 760aa5f9-2fc0-4142-a348-0ec7ad4362c9. One render job created during this run (3309af74-c613-4595-b738-3381e6f8cca8.mp4 under /api/static/renders/760aa5f9-...). Public share token regenerated (fBnG6KxHdUbU48g5h-NoHzhEtmEGQl-U). No cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Render testids confirmed live: tab-render, render-checklist, pre-script|scenes|metadata|thumbnail|voiceover|scene_assets (class includes #00FF66 when ok, #FF3366 when failing), render-preview-thumbnail, render-preview-voiceover, render-start-btn, render-cancel-btn, render-job-<status> where status ∈ {queued,validating,preparing_assets,rendering,completed,failed,cancelled}, render-error, render-output, render-video-player, render-download-btn (<A> with download attr), render-retry-btn, render-refresh, render-history-<jobId>, export-package-zip. Render duration for the 16-scene seeded project ≈ 3 minutes end-to-end. Share testids: share-panel, share-enable-btn, share-url-input, share-copy-btn, share-open-btn, share-regenerate-btn, share-disable-btn. Public page: share-hero-thumbnail, share-final-video (<VIDEO> w/ poster), share-voiceover-player, share-display-title. Overview tile: overview-final-video (contains <video>). /api/public/share/<token>.final_video shape is {url, duration, width, height}.
partial_coverage_note: The 'blank project' negative test was NOT executed end-to-end: (a) UI CreateProject form submit did not advance (unknown required field testids) and (b) direct POST /api/projects via page.request returned 422 with the naive payload used. The start-btn disabled state + tooltip + 'Missing requirements' toast path was verified by code inspection of RenderPanel.jsx (disabled={!canRender||starting}, title=`Missing: ${issues.join(', ')}`, toast.error('Cannot start render', {description: detail.issues.join(' · ')}) when backend returns {issues:[...]}). Recommend main agent or next testing agent re-run the negative path after confirming the Project create schema fields (e.g., sub_niche, description, keywords) required by Pydantic.
rca of the issue: No bugs. Everything rendered and served as designed.
